name:
I think I'm in real trouble now. There's a fellow here with
a pitchfork and pointed tail. ...Oh Hell!
description:
I think I'm in real trouble now. There's a fellow here with
a pitchfork and pointed tail. ...Oh Hell!
hints: You are dead and in Hell. This is a death room with no exits.
You should not be here. Restore a saved game or restart. Avoid falling into the bottomless pit or dying elsewhere.
notes: Death room - Hell. No exits. Reached by falling down the bottomless hole (room 30 going DOWN) or other fatal actions. Game over if you end up here without being sent to Limbo (room 33).
